subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Verily, Thy servant Isaac hath waned into darkness, and been lost from this mortal realm, and left behind his kin [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک اسحق قد وقع فی المحاق و فقد فی هذ النشئه الاولی و اورث اهله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
